title: Information Security Risk Management Standard & Procedure (PDF)
display_label: Information Security Risk Management Standard & Procedure
content: Information Security Risk Management Standard & Procedure for Morgan State University. Establishes a formal process for identifying, assessing, and managing risks to MSU's information systems. Defines methodologies necessary to evaluate risks, implement mitigation strategies, and ensure ongoing protection of information assets. Aligned with national and international frameworks: NIST SP 800-37, NIST SP 800-53, ISO 27005, and ISO 31000. Part of MSU's Research Security Program (cybersecurity pillar). Hosted on Google Drive. Linked from the Research Security Information Technology Resources page.
